benefits.description: Lost 10+kg (22+lb) in 4 weeks, towards the end of weight loss journey

side_effects.description: Mild nausea mostly after eating during week 3
Severe appetite suppression at weeks 4-5+; could not eat at all, even looking at food caused mental repulsion; drinking water was hard, swallowing supplements caused gagging
Extremely cold — wearing 2 pairs of socks, using hot water bottle, shivering under blankets on a 23°C day; attributed to severe caloric deficit and glucagon axis stimulation
No energy to do anything; workouts were very poor quality despite maintaining gym attendance
No bowel movements for 3+ weeks due to severely reduced food intake

protocol_notes: Switched from Tirz to reta with no washout. Escalation schedule: week 0 = 7.5mg Tirz, week 1 = 2.5mg Reta, week 2 = 5.0mg Reta, week 3 = 7.5mg Reta, week 4 = 10.0mg Reta, week 5+ = 12.5mg Reta. Was towards end of weight loss journey after 10 months of dieting. DEXA scan confirmed some muscle loss. Retrospectively assessed pushing too hard; set body transformation back 3+ months due to muscle loss. Recommends going slower.
